item.title: Bowman, Responsible Innovation and Financial Inclusion
item.description: Speech At “Next-Gen Financial Inclusion,” the third annual Financial Inclusion Conference hosted by the Federal Reserve Board, Washington, D.C. (via pre-recorded video)

item.title: Barr, Will Artificial Intelligence Broadly Raise Living Standards or Drive Income and Wealth Inequality?
item.description: Speech At “Next-Gen Financial Inclusion,” the third annual Financial Inclusion Conference hosted by the Federal Reserve Board
